title: Security: heap-use-after-use in DiscountURLLoader::NavigateToDiscountURL
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
If we login a user and visit a url match cart rules, CartService will be created for the profile. When CartService construct, |cart_db_| initializing and so is the ProfileProtoDB instance |cart_db_->proto_db_|. The initialization of ProfileProtoDB is an async task run on
